---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-02-19"
---

```{r}
demografi <- readxl::read_excel("../../../../../../Volumes/enheder/FORCE/FORCE Adfærd/Fastholdelse 2 (2024) (CNJ) /Data/060125/Til Lasse/Demografi_oversigt.xlsx")

```

```{r}
demografi1 <- demografi %>%
  mutate(ID = str_remove(ResponseId, "R_")) %>% select(ID, Deltageralder, Deltagerkøn, Deltagerregion)

demografi_clean <- demografi1 %>%
  rename(
    ID = ID,
    age = Deltageralder,
    gender = Deltagerkøn,
    region = Deltagerregion
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gender = tolower(gender),
    gender = factor(gender, 
                    levels = c("mand", "kvinde")),  # Convert to categorical variable
    region = as.factor(region)   # Convert to categorical variable
  ) %>% select(ID, age, gender, region)

write_csv(demografi_clean, "../../data/demographic/demographic_data.csv")

```
